recommendations.title: Cul-de-sac
recommendations.overview: On the run and in search of help, two wounded gangsters find refuge in the secluded castle of a feeble man and his wife; however, under the point of a gun, nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Running Scared
recommendations.overview: A low-ranking thug is entrusted by his boss to dispose of a gun that killed corrupt cops, but things spiral out of control when the gun ends up in wrong hands.

recommendations.title: Criminal Activities
recommendations.overview: Four young men make a risky investment together that gets them into trouble with the mob.

recommendations.title: Miss Sloane
recommendations.overview: An ambitious lobbyist faces off against the powerful gun lobby in an attempt to pass gun control legislation.

recommendations.title: Ice Age: A Mammoth Christmas
recommendations.overview: When Sid accidentally destroys Manny's heirloom Christmas rock and ends up on Santa's naughty list, he leads a hilarious quest to the North Pole to make things right and ends up making things much worse. Now it's up to Manny and his prehistoric posse

recommendations.title: Contracted
recommendations.overview: A young woman contracts what she believes to be an STD—but it ends up being a far worse disease.

recommendations.title: Speed Kills
recommendations.overview: Speedboat racing champion and multimillionaire Ben Aronoff leads a double life that lands him in trouble with the law and drug lords.

recommendations.title: Boiling Point
recommendations.overview: Masaki, a baseball player and gas-station attendant, gets into trouble with the local Yakuza and goes to Okinawa to get a gun to defend himself. There he meets Uehara, a tough gangster, who is in serious debt to the yakuza and planning revenge.

recommendations.title: Lifechanger
recommendations.overview: A murderous shapeshifter sets out on a blood-soaked mission to make things right with the woman he loves.

recommendations.title: A Perfect World
recommendations.overview: A kidnapped boy strikes up a friendship with his captor: an escaped convict on the run from the law, headed by an honorable U.S. Marshal.
